queries: per-layer learnable gradient dampening spike-triggered transformer training stabilization 2025 2026
depth-graded gradient scaling coefficient anti-correlated layer transformer LLM

raw_responses.title: Spike No More: Stabilizing the Pre-training of LLMs (COLM 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: rapid amplification of shortcut norm + intensification of gradients before/after LN; stabilization requires small sub-layers + large shortcut; Scaled Embed prevents spikes 13B.

raw_responses.title: GPAS Gradient-Preserving Activation Scaling (2026)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: learnable SiLU-gate scaling on post-residual sum; stop-gradient trick preserves gradient magnitudes; per-layer SCALAR via learnable gate.

raw_responses.title: Post-LayerNorm Is Back: Keel highway-residual (2026)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: Highway-style residual preserves gradient flow; replaces ResNet residual; layered depth-stable signal.

raw_responses.title: Peri-LN Revisiting LayerNorm (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: per-layer normalization placement; layer-graded stabilization.

raw_responses.title: Normalization Layer Per-Example Gradients sufficient to predict noise scale (2024)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: per-layer gradient noise prediction; per-layer aware training.

raw_responses.title: LLM-from-scratch gradient clipping interventions (2026/02)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: gradient clipping interventions; global clip-by-norm vs adaptive.

raw_responses.title: Leveraging the True Depth of LLMs (2025/02)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: depth-aware re-architecting; deeper layers under-utilised in Pre-LN.

raw_responses.title: Progressive Gradient Flow N:M Sparsity (ICML 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: induced gradient noise progressive flow; identifies high-sparsity training gradient issue.
